title: Business event (BusinessEventsContract + BusinessEventsBase)
instruction: In the sandbox model, define a business event fired when an ConDemoNoteHeader record is created. Create: (1) a DataContract class DemoNoteHeaderCreatedContract extending BusinessEventsContract, with parm methods for NoteId and Subject (decorated [DataMemberAttribute]), and a static newFromNoteHeader(ConDemoNoteHeader) factory; (2) a business event class DemoNoteHeaderCreatedBusinessEvent extending BusinessEventsBase, decorated [BusinessEvents(classStr(DemoNoteHeaderCreatedContract), '<name>', '<description>', ModuleAxapta::<module>)], with a static newFromContract() factory and a [Hookable(false)] buildContract() override returning the held contract. Use get_knowledge(topic="business events") to ground the pattern. Both classes must build clean.
